description: Add an ao.agent.message MCP tool that allows running agents to send structured messages to other agents. Message types: question, handoff, status_update, review_request. Messages are persisted in .ao/state/agent-messages/ as JSON files. If target agent is running, message is delivered to its context on next tool call. If not running, message is queued and delivered when the target agent next starts. This enables EM to ask PO for clarification, SWE to request code review from another SWE, etc.
title: Add inter-agent messaging MCP tool (ao.agent.message)
